description: Raise SSS min_confluence_score from 2 to 3. Confluence interacts with hour_cos (SHAP interaction 0.1140), meaning higher confluence requirements naturally filter out the marginal setups that fail during problematic time windows. The rules show that low-confluence trades taken during hours 3-21 UTC (where hour_cos<0.63) drag the win rate to 15-20%. Requiring a 3rd confluence point forces the strategy to wait for stronger alignment before entering.
expected_improvement: Win rate from ~29.5% to ~34-36% by eliminating tier-C and weak tier-B entries that fail outside the Asian session. Trade count will drop ~20-30%, but surviving trades carry much higher edge. Net expectancy improvement ~15-20%.
